# Harvest Moon: Echoes of Teradea Guide

Unofficial English fan guide for Harvest Moon: Echoes of Teradea.

Canonical site: https://harvestmoonechoesofteradea.wiki/
Sitemap: https://harvestmoonechoesofteradea.wiki/sitemap.xml

Important pages:
- https://harvestmoonechoesofteradea.wiki/release-date/
- https://harvestmoonechoesofteradea.wiki/platforms/
- https://harvestmoonechoesofteradea.wiki/preorder/
- https://harvestmoonechoesofteradea.wiki/beginner-guide/
- https://harvestmoonechoesofteradea.wiki/farming-guide/
- https://harvestmoonechoesofteradea.wiki/village-restoration/
- https://harvestmoonechoesofteradea.wiki/map-exploration/
- https://harvestmoonechoesofteradea.wiki/romance/
- https://harvestmoonechoesofteradea.wiki/items-recipes-materials/

Data policy: gameplay-specific values are not treated as confirmed until official material or released gameplay verifies them.
